Input Output Global Breaks Silence On Cardano Constitution Governance Action
data.description:
Input Output Global (IOG), the main developer behind the Cardano blockchain, has provided insights into its Constitutional transition. IOG confirmed that the blockchain’s Interim Constitution has transitioned to the Cardano Constitution. The Cardano Constitutional Voting and IOG Rationale Input Output Global disclosed that its Interim Constitutional Council (ICC) voted ‘Yes’ for the Governance...
source: https://www.thecoinrepublic.com/2025/02/15/input-output-global-breaks-silence-on-cardano-constitution-governance-action/

data.title: This Week in Bitcoin: ETF Flows Turn Red, SEC Hack Plea and GameStop Considers Buying
data.description:

source: https://decrypt.co/306000/this-week-bitcoin-etf-flows-red-sec-hack-gamestop

data.title:
$ETH The levels to watch are clear.

Break the $2.8K area and hold it as support, and we can start looking towards a move to those cycle highs at ~$4K again on the higher timeframe.

For now, price is still stuck within this ~$2.2K-$2.8K range and is technically at resistance.
Senator Lummis Leads Push for Bitcoin in U.S. Economy
data.description:
Senator Cynthia Lummis pushes for the Bitcoin Strategic Reserve, shaping U.S. crypto policy as President Trump backs Bitcoin’s role in the economy.
source: https://coinpaprika.com/news/senator-lummis-leads-push-for-bitcoin-in-u-s-economy

data.title: Binance’s Major Update: Tracking Token Unlocks for Smarter Crypto Investing
data.description:
The post Binance’s Major Update: Tracking Token Unlocks for Smarter Crypto Investing appeared first on Coinpedia Fintech News
Token unlocks can shake up the market, causing prices to pump or dump depending on supply and demand. Large unlocks often lead to sell-offs as early investors cash out, while smaller ones may have little impact. Some tokens may see a short-lived pump before a drop,...
source: https://coinpedia.org/news/binances-major-update-tracking-token-unlocks-for-smarter-crypto-investing/

data.title: Ripple omits CBDCs in new website design, aligns with Trump executive order
data.description:
Popular cryptocurrency token issuer Ripple has unveiled a revamped version of its website, sparking a reaction with the omission of Central Bank Digital Currencies (CBDCs) that used to be on the platform. The company’s announcement on the blogging website X talked about a new look on its products, websites, and socials as it commits to […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/ripple-omits-cbdc-in-new-website/
